initiatives.name: High Country Mutual Aid
initiatives.description: A grassroots organization fostering mutual aid and community support in the High Country region of North Carolina. They coordinate direct assistance, resource sharing, and solidarity networks while building power through community organizing and creating spaces for collective care and support.

initiatives.name: High Country Peace and Justice
initiatives.description: HCPJ is a grassroots organization focused on education and action around the increasing intersection of global environmental, peace and justice crises

initiatives.name: Appalachian Abortion Support Collective
initiatives.description: A local source of information for people seeking abortion information in and around Boone, North Carolina.

initiatives.name: Little Free Pantry of Boone
initiatives.description: Give what you can, take what you need. We are a pantry located at 130 Poplar Grove Road Connector available to ALL.
